description: Move points onto an external geometric set. The points to be moved are defined by the < range >. Movement of each point is done along the beam-line defined by keyword until it intersects the external geometric set. The < novalidate > option skips validation of all blocks moved as part of the drape operation.
notes: Requires a current building-blocks set: run 'building-blocks set create <name>' then 'building-blocks set select <name>' before any block/edge/face/point operation; otherwise FLAC rejects the command with 'Unused extra parameter'.

keywords.name: inwards
keywords.description: Extend the beam-line from each point to the focus point v .

keywords.name: outwards
keywords.description: Extend the beam-line from the focus point v to each point.

keywords.name: direction
keywords.description: Set the beam-line as a constant direction vector v .
